import os
import shutil
import sys
import torch
from transformers import Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

base_path = "/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct/"
merged_path = "checkpoints/merged/"

def make_soup(alpha, out_path):
    os.makedirs(out_path, exist_ok=True)
    for fn in os.listdir(merged_path):
        if fn.startswith("model.") or fn.endswith(".bin") or fn.endswith(".pt"):
            continue
        src = os.path.join(merged_path, fn)
        if os.path.isfile(src):
            shutil.copy(src, os.path.join(out_path, fn))

    print(f"Loading base model to CPU...")
    base = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(
        base_path, trust_remote_code=True, torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16, device_map="cpu"
    )
    print(f"Loading merged model to CPU...")
    merged = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(
        merged_path, trust_remote_code=True, torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16, device_map="cpu"
    )

    print(f"Interpolating with alpha={alpha}...")
    base_sd = base.state_dict()
    merged_sd = merged.state_dict()
    new_sd = {}
    for k in base_sd:
        new_sd[k] = base_sd[k] + (merged_sd[k] - base_sd[k]) * alpha

    merged.load_state_dict(new_sd)
    print(f"Saving to {out_path}...")
    merged.save_pretrained(out_path, safe_serialization=True)
    print("Done.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    alpha = float(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 0.5
    out = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else f"checkpoints/merged_alpha_{int(alpha*100):02d}"
    make_soup(alpha, out)
